question: Will a Russian IRBM/ICBM strike the Kyiv metropolitan area before June 1, 2026?
reason: Russia's recent use of the Oreshnik hypersonic missile in Kyiv indicates a high likelihood of further IRBM/ICBM strikes before June 1, 2026.
evidence: On May 24, 2026, Russia launched a massive attack on Kyiv using the Oreshnik hypersonic missile, marking its third deployment in the conflict.
The Russian Ministry of Defense confirmed the use of the Oreshnik missile, capable of carrying nuclear or conventional warheads, targeting Ukrainian military infrastructure.
Following the May 24 attack, Russia announced plans for new mass long-range strikes on Kyiv, including on 'decision-making centers,' in retaliation for a Ukrainian strike in occupied Luhansk Oblast.
searchQueries: Russian IRBM or ICBM strike on Kyiv before June 1, 2026
